prompt: Create an ultra-high-quality cinematic 3D digital social-media poster featuring a stylish young male creator sitting confidently on glossy black steps in a vibrant yellow-and-gold Snapchat-inspired environment. The man wears a bright yellow hoodie with a small white ghost logo on the chest, clean white jogger trousers, white sneakers with yellow accents and a small ghost logo, a wristwatch, and modern dark hair; his face is intentionally covered by a soft rectangular blur for anonymity. He sits relaxed with one knee raised, one hand resting near his leg, and the other hand raised in a peace sign. Behind him, place a huge glowing rounded-square yellow icon with a white ghost silhouette, rim-lit with intense neon yellow. On the left side, create exactly 5 stacked rounded glassmorphism statistic cards plus 1 circular crown badge above them: card 1 reads “9.8K Likes” with a heart icon, card 2 reads “Capture Fun” with a smiling emoji, card 3 reads “Stay Playful” with a sunglasses emoji, card 4 reads “2.3K Followers” with an add-person icon, and card 5 reads “1.1M Views” with a rising chart icon. Add exactly 8 floating glossy yellow emoji spheres around the scene: one laughing face near the top center-left, one sunglasses face near the upper left, one smiling face near the top right, one large winking/laughing face on the right, one small smiley near the seated figure’s left leg, one laughing face near the lower right, one large blurred foreground laughing face at the bottom left, and one partial blurred yellow emoji sphere at the bottom right edge. Add tiny glowing dots, stars, sparkles, and bokeh throughout the golden background. Across the lower center, write the creator name “Mr Tariq” in large handwritten neon yellow script, with “AI Creator” underneath in clean white sans-serif text flanked by short yellow lines. Use dramatic studio lighting, warm golden color grading, high contrast, glossy reflections, shallow depth of field, cinematic composition, vertical poster aspect ratio, sharp 3D realism, no extra text, no watermark.
